name: Roasted Pork Loin
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pork loin roast with bone generously with olive oil.
2. Combine 3 tablespoons of garlic salt, 3 tablespoons of regular salt, 3 tablespoons of black pepper, 3 tablespoons of paprika, and 3 tablespoons of dry mustard in a bowl.
3. Rub the seasoning mixture all over the pork loin.
4. Place the seasoned roast onto a rack in a roasting pan.
5. Roast at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
6. Lower the temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and continue roasting for another 60 minutes.
7. Remove the roast from the oven and let it stand for 15-30 minutes before carving.
8. Meanwhile, heat the fruit glaze in a saucepan over low flame.
9. Carve the roast into thin slices.
10. Arrange the slices on a heated platter.
11. Drizzle the heated glaze over the sliced pork loin.
12. Serve hot.
